deepDive.title: Learning Action Priors for Cross-embodiment Robot Manipulation
deepDive.summary: This paper is a training infrastructure lead from the research stream. Most Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models build on a Vision-Language Model (VLM) backbone by attaching an action module and optimizing the full policy jointly. It gets the longer read because the public context is source-grounded and the item is close to the systems layer.
